title: Life Steal Mod
description: A mod inspired by the life steal SMP. But not based off the life steal SMP.
body:
## Lifesteal Mod

This mod is **INSPIRED not BASED** off the life steal smp.
When you **die** you **lose one heart** and when you use a **heart item** you **gain one heart**.
A **gamerule** allows for the person to change the max heart count which is 40 (**two rows of hearts**)
Two Commands, one that **players can use** and could **take away hearts** and turn them into **heart items** and **the second** which is **used by admins** to **set the max hearts of players**.

When a **revival block** is **placed down** it **adds one to a variable called revives**.
Then a **third command** that can **only be used when the revives is one or more**, which is a "**/revive**" command which can revive players if the **player that is using it** **isn't dead** and the **player using it** also has **one or more revives**.

<details>
<summary>In a Modpack</summary>

I am **fine** with this **being used in a modpack** as long as credited. But isn't totally recommended though. 

</details>
